name: Fusilli Alla Sorrentina (Sorrento-style Fusil
recipeIngredient: 5 oz Canned Tuna in Olive Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fusilli al dente according to package instructions.
2. Drain the tuna and crumble it by hand.
3. In a skillet, sauté garlic in olive oil over medium heat until transparent.
4. Add crumbled tuna and cook for 2 minutes more.
5. Stir in olives, wine, and tomatoes. Simmer for 10-15 minutes.
6. Add mint leaves, salt, pepper, and parsley; toss with cooked pasta.
7. Serve immediately.
